title: Avatar
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Avatar primitive preserving root, image, fallback, modeled image loading state, status data attributes, native image props, and image load/error message hooks.

examples.title: AvatarHero
examples.description: Base UI Avatar hero fixture with image, fallback, and text fallback avatar.

deviations.summary: Image loading is caller-owned Foldkit model state instead of an internal React Image effect.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source must remain pure and unidirectional. The helper exposes image load/error message hooks and derives rendered parts from the caller's modeled ImageLoadingStatus.

deviations.summary: Fallback delay visibility is represented by explicit delayStatus state instead of an internal timer.
deviations.rationale: Timers belong in Foldkit commands or subscriptions owned by an app model. The installable helper preserves fallback visibility semantics without hidden lifecycle state.
